title: PM Lane 171 - Local Workflow Gates Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power workflow-gate scan burden by grouping the existing read-only Workflow Gates cards without changing gate content, exports, storage behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Workflow Gates into Source Review Gates, Approval Readiness Gates, and Future Import Boundary.
Preserved the same six read-only gate cards, labels, dynamic detail text, status pills, and no-write language.
Kept the workflow-gates disclosure behavior local and stateless with no workflow-gates localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.

validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 171 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
